notes:
First release built from `main` since the d406008b dev-branch panel gutting (1.3.66 onward). Brings 73 panel files / 25,607 lines of canonical UI back to shipped builds.

What's now actually in the app:

Engine fixes (1.3.93 carry-overs + new):
- jjang-ai/vmlx#103: scheduler deferred SSM re-derive gates on _has_unprocessed + _has_waiting
- jjang-ai/vmlx#105: removed redundant mx.array() wrap in mamba cache clones
- jjang-ai/vmlx#107: PLD auto-tune kill-switch bails out before warmup window
- jjang-ai/vmlx#109: MLLM batch generator captures-during-prefill at boundary N-1-gpl
- jjang-ai/vmlx#110: SSMCompanionDiskStore L2 write-through (multi-turn cache survives restart)
- jjang-ai/vmlx#112: MLLM scheduler dedicated mllm-worker_0 single-worker executor (eliminates Stream(gpu,1) crash on JANGTQ-VL)
- NEW jjang-ai/vmlx#114: cross-shard pre-fix for mixed-precision JANG VLMs. _collect_shard_shape_map + _pre_fix_bits_from_metadata catch modules whose .weight + .scales straddle a shard boundary. Verified on Holo3-35B-A3B-JANGTQ4: 2 cross-shard pairs found that per-shard pass would silently skip.
- NEW jjang-ai/vmlx#115: ModelConfigRegistry.lookup resolves HF repo IDs via ~/.mlxstudio/models/<repo_id>/ + HF cache before file probes. No more spurious 'No such file or directory' warning on startup.
- DSV4 long-context bundle (md5 3e526780fa16b7a950d766f347341b70)
- Scalar mxtq_bits=N HF config form normalized to {routed_expert: N} matching Swift loader

Panel restored to canonical (was gutted on dev since 1.3.66):
- SessionConfigForm with 46 t('sessions.config.*') i18n calls — session settings now translate properly across en/es/zh/ko/ja
- All 5 locales restored to 964 keys per language. Previous releases shipped only 219 keys per language.
- Full SessionView, SessionCard, SessionDashboard, ServerSettingsDrawer, SessionSettings, SetupScreen, ChatInterface, ChatSettings, EndpointList, ThemeProvider, AppStateContext, SessionsContext — all back to their canonical 1.3.85-era versions.

Multi-turn cache live-verified on Holo3-35B-A3B-JANGTQ4 (continuous-batching + paged + prefix + L2 disk):
  T1 prompt=25  cached=None comp=120 tps=43.7 (cold)
  T2 prompt=161 cached= 24  comp=115 tps=46.2
  T3 prompt=188 cached=128  comp=120 tps=52.9
  T4 prompt=323 cached=128  comp=120 tps=45.1
  hits=3 misses=1 hit_rate=0.75 tokens_saved=344 ssm_companion.entries=4
  L2 disk: ~/.cache/vmlx-engine/prompt-cache/Holo3-35B-A3B-JANGTQ4_*/cache_index.db
Closes PERF-VL-MULTITURN-2026-04-16 audit ('VL multi-turn cached=0').

Update channels: GH release v1.3.94, latest.json 1.3.94, PyPI vmlx 1.3.94, engine __version__ 1.3.94, panel package.json 1.3.94.
